Volatility | Intraday post (30/Jan)

Weekly post:

FOMC Week, long zomma/short vomma | Weekly post (26-30/Jan)

I dropped a very important broader macro and micro market report containing institutionals, geo, yen etc-etc.:

Earning season, Micro and Macro flows, Carry trade & Geopolitic landscape | Quant Insights - January 2026

For yesterday, the Sunday post predicted profit taking day, and the daily post predicted spot down/vol down move towards the target and a rebound from their back up. The post is free, you can examine it. Meanwhile I kept warning you to not buy into this gold momentum, and marked 5280 as the main pivot.

Geo risk is real and as I warned you it’s getting even more serious.

Yesterday I shared this chart:

(in the report linked above, you can read about it)Watch closely how the yields move. In this context, when yields start to fall, you better know the music is over, and the cycle turned. Soon it will… (my model already gave the signal)

I don’t want to comment on Warsh nomination, we should see how market digests it. More on this in the weekly post…

ES held the lows during asia session. 6975/80 is still a main pivotal zone. To the downside its 6940/50 zone is what would confirm if buyers are still there or not. If not, 6900 is the level that is a trend shifting line.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The speed profile is net negative again, but now the emphasis is on the upside vol bid and on creating a supportive centroid zone. Especially as upside vol of vol is being sold. The key zone is 6870 - 6940, book became very thin there. Now market bets on liquidity with 93% increase in gamma til 6900, but below that line, market sees that short-term structure is broken.

Centroid is at 6902.98 - 6910.81 range. This is expected to be reversionish back towards 6930 and pin there. Its supportive effect is mostly during the PM session. (Market tolerates 6875)

Downside pivot is at 6844.18Target is 6814.68with a reversion expectation back to 6870/75

Upside pivot is at 6983.81with target of 7005.85Seems unlikely to be broken, especially into the PM session. More like a reversion back to 6930.

Below the centroid, market sells intraday vvol, but not as much as to the upside. The market excepts a volatile move around 6930, with a wide range. this value is equals to the monthly VWMA too. However market expects stabilization only in case of a downside move. It sees less liquidity upward.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
